extension.name: JoomlaBoost - Universal SEO & Performance Plugin
extension.author: JoomlaBoost Team
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later

field.name: robots_auto_sync
field.label: Auto-Sync robots.txt File
field.description: Automatically update physical robots.txt file to match plugin rules. Recommended to prevent conflicts with Joomla updates.

field.name: sitemap_include_articles
field.label: Include Articles
field.description: Add published articles

field.name: sitemap_include_categories
field.label: Include Categories
field.description: Add category pages

field.name: sitemap_include_menu
field.label: Include Menu Items
field.description: Add menu items

field.name: sitemap_menu_depth
field.label: Menu Depth
field.description: Control menu hierarchy depth (0 = unlimited, 1 = top level only, 2 = two levels)

field.name: sitemap_menu_types
field.label: Select Menus
field.description: Choose which menus to include (empty = all menus)
field.query: SELECT menutype AS value, title FROM #__menu_types ORDER BY title

field.name: sitemap_article_categories
field.label: Select Categories
field.description: Choose categories (empty = all)

field.name: sitemap_exclude_ids
field.label: Exclude Article IDs
field.description: Comma-separated IDs (e.g., 1,5,12)

field.name: sitemap_max_articles
field.label: Max Articles
field.description: 0 = unlimited

field.name: sitemap_hreflang
field.label: Multilingual Sitemap
field.description: Add xhtml:link hreflang alternate tags for each URL in all active languages. Requires Joomla Language Filter plugin active. Works with Falang and native Joomla multilingual. Default: OFF.

field.name: og_override_note
field.label: 📝 Per-Article OpenGraph Overrides
field.description: To override OpenGraph meta tags for specific articles, use Joomla Custom Fields (com_fields). Create fields named: custom_og_image, custom_og_title, custom_og_description. Priority: Custom Fields → Featured Image → Global Config.

field.name: org_name_en
field.label: Organization Name (EN)
field.description: Schema.org organization name — English

field.name: org_name_sr
field.label: Organization Name (SR/ME — Srpski/Crnogorski)
field.description: Naziv organizacije na srpskom/crnogorskom

field.name: org_description_en
field.label: Organization Description (EN)
field.description: Short description of your organization — English (1-2 sentences)
field.hint: e.g., Luxury adult-only resort on the Montenegrin Adriatic coast.

field.name: org_description_sr
field.label: Organization Description (SR/ME — Srpski/Crnogorski)
field.description: Kratak opis organizacije na srpskom/crnogorskom (1-2 rečenice)
field.hint: npr. Luksuzni resort za odrasle na crnogorskom Jadranu.

field.name: org_logo_en
field.label: Organization Logo (EN)
field.description: Logo for English language pages

field.name: org_logo_sr
field.label: Organization Logo (SR/ME)
field.description: Logo za srpske/crnogorske stranice

field.name: schema_type
field.label: Schema.org Organization Type
field.description: Choose the type of schema for your organization. Auto-detect uses site characteristics, LocalBusiness includes geo/address data, Hotel includes accommodation-specific fields, Organization is generic.

field.name: schema_url
field.label: Organization URL
field.description: Official website URL (auto-detected if empty)

field.name: schema_telephone
field.label: Telephone
field.description: Organization contact telephone number

field.name: schema_social_facebook
field.label: Facebook URL
field.description: Full URL to your Facebook page

field.name: schema_social_instagram
field.label: Instagram URL
field.description: Full URL to your Instagram profile

field.name: schema_social_youtube
field.label: YouTube URL
field.description: Full URL to your YouTube channel

field.name: schema_social_twitter
field.label: Twitter/X URL
field.description: Full URL to your Twitter/X profile

field.name: schema_social_linkedin
field.label: LinkedIn URL
field.description: Full URL to your LinkedIn page

field.name: schema_latitude
field.label: Latitude
field.description: Geographic latitude (e.g., 44.0165)

field.name: schema_longitude
field.label: Longitude
field.description: Geographic longitude (e.g., 21.0059)

field.name: schema_address_country
field.label: Country Code
field.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., RS, US, GB)

field.name: schema_address_locality_en
field.label: City/Locality (EN)
field.description: City name in English

field.name: schema_address_locality_sr
field.label: City/Locality (SR/ME)
field.description: Naziv grada na srpskom/crnogorskom

field.name: schema_address_street_en
field.label: Street Address (EN)
field.description: Street address in English

field.name: schema_address_street_sr
field.label: Street Address (SR/ME)
field.description: Adresa ulice na srpskom/crnogorskom

field.name: schema_address_zip
field.label: Postal Code
field.description: ZIP or postal code

field.name: schema_phone
field.label: Phone Number
field.description: Business phone in international format

field.name: schema_email
field.label: Email Address
field.description: Business contact email

field.name: schema_price_range
field.label: Price Range
field.description: Price range indicator for services

field.name: schema_opening_hours
field.label: Opening Hours
field.description: Business opening hours (e.g., Mo-Su 09:00-18:00)

field.name: schema_hotel_star_rating
field.label: Star Rating
field.description: Hotel star rating (1-5 stars)

field.name: schema_hotel_checkin_time
field.label: Check-in Time
field.description: Standard check-in time (24h format)

field.name: schema_hotel_checkout_time
field.label: Check-out Time
field.description: Standard check-out time (24h format)

field.name: schema_hotel_pets_allowed
field.label: Pets Allowed
field.description: Are pets allowed in the hotel?

field.name: schema_rating_value
field.label: Average Rating
field.description: Average guest rating (e.g., 4.6). Google shows this in search results and AI Overviews.

field.name: schema_rating_count
field.label: Number of Reviews
field.description: Total number of guest reviews. More reviews = stronger signal for AI search.

field.name: schema_rating_best
field.label: Best Rating (Max)
field.description: Maximum possible rating on the platform (usually 5 or 10)

field.name: schema_rating_worst
field.label: Worst Rating (Min)
field.description: Minimum possible rating (usually 1)

field.name: schema_rating_source
field.label: Rating Source
field.description: Platform where reviews are collected (e.g., Booking.com, Google, TripAdvisor)

field.name: faq_auto_detect
field.label: Auto-Detect FAQ from Content
field.description:
Automatically detect Q&A pairs from article content. Looks for description lists (
/
/
) and headings (

/

followed by

). Generates FAQPage JSON-LD per page. Recommended: YES.

field.name: enable_manual_faqs
field.label: Enable Manual FAQs
field.description: Add custom FAQ items via JSON editor below. These will be merged with auto-detected FAQs.

field.name: manual_faq_scope
field.label: Global FAQ — When to Apply
field.description: Controls on which pages the manually entered FAQ (below) is injected as Schema markup. Auto-detect always runs first; this setting defines what happens with the global FAQ in relation to it.
field.option: Fallback on all pages — show global FAQ on any page without auto-detected FAQ
All pages — always inject global FAQ, ignore auto-detect
Homepage fallback — show global FAQ on homepage only, if no auto-detected FAQ
Homepage only — always inject global FAQ on homepage, ignore auto-detect
Disabled — global FAQ is saved but never injected into Schema

field.name: manual_faqs_en
field.label: Manual FAQ Items (EN — English)
field.description: FAQ items in JSON format for English pages. Format: [{"question": "Q?", "answer": "A."}]

field.name: manual_faqs_sr
field.label: Manual FAQ Items (SR/ME — Srpski/Crnogorski)
field.description: FAQ u JSON formatu za srpski/crnogorski jezik. Format: [{"question": "Pitanje?", "answer": "Odgovor."}]

field.name: faq_json_help
field.label: JSON Format Help
field.description: Format: Array of objects. Example: [{"question": "What?", "answer": "This!"}]. Note: Auto-detected FAQs from article content are already translated by Falang automatically.

field.name: gsc_verification_meta
field.label: Google Site Verification Code (Primary)
field.description: Paste only the content value from the meta tag: <meta name='google-site-verification' content='PASTE_THIS_VALUE'/>

field.name: gsc_verification_meta_2
field.label: Google Site Verification Code (Secondary — optional)
field.description: Second verification code if you have two Google Search Console properties (e.g. www + non-www, or two organizations). Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: ga4_consent_mode
field.label: GDPR Consent Mode
field.description: How GA4 is injected in relation to GDPR consent. NONE: injected immediately, no consent control. YOOTHEME: script is blocked (type=text/plain) until user accepts Statistics in YooTheme consent banner — REQUIRES one-time setup in YooTheme Customizer: go to Scripts, enable Google Analytics container (code can stay empty). GTM: skip direct GA4, let GTM handle it with its own consent settings.

field.name: gtm_container_id
field.label: PLG_SYSTEM_JOOMLABOOST_GTM_CONTAINER_ID_LABEL
field.description: GTM Container ID (format: GTM-XXXXXXX). NOTE: If YooTheme also has GA4 configured in its own Customizer integrations, disable GA4 here (or use mode Via GTM) to avoid duplicate tracking.

field.name: indexnow_enabled
field.label: Enable IndexNow
field.description: Automatically notify Bing, Yandex and Seznam when content is published or updated. Requires a valid API key.

field.name: indexnow_key_generator
indexnow_api_key
field.label: IndexNow API Key
field.description: Your unique IndexNow key. The plugin will create the required verification file at your site root automatically.

field.name: indexnow_note
field.label: How IndexNow Works
field.description: Save plugin → key file auto-created → every published article is instantly pinged to Bing/Yandex/Seznam. AI search engines discover new content in minutes, not days.

field.name: separator_llmstxt
field.label: LLMs.txt — AI Crawler Visibility (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)

field.name: llmstxt_enabled
field.label: Generate /llms.txt
field.description: Creates a structured /llms.txt file at the site root that helps AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) understand your site's content and structure.

field.name: llmstxt_custom_pages
field.label: Custom Pages for LLMs.txt
field.description: Optional extra pages as JSON. Format: [{"title": "Page Name", "url": "/path", "description": "Brief description"}]

field.name: llmstxt_note
field.label: How LLMs.txt Works
field.description: An emerging AI standard (llmstxt.org). JoomlaBoost auto-fills it with org data, menu pages, ratings, contact & social links. Visit yourdomain.com/llms.txt to verify after saving.

field.name: meta_pixel_id
field.label: Meta Pixel ID (Primary)
field.description: Your primary Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID

field.name: meta_pixel_id_2
field.label: Meta Pixel ID (Secondary — optional)
field.description: Second Pixel ID if you need to track two accounts simultaneously (e.g. agency + client). Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: pixel_consent_mode
field.label: GDPR Consent Mode
field.description: How Meta Pixel is injected in relation to GDPR consent. NONE: injected immediately, no consent control. YOOTHEME: script is blocked (type=text/plain, data-category=marketing.meta-pixel) until user accepts Marketing in YooTheme consent banner — REQUIRES one-time setup in YooTheme Customizer: go to Scripts, enable Meta Pixel container (code can stay empty).

field.name: fb_domain_verification
field.label: Facebook Domain Verification Code
field.description: Enter the verification code from Facebook Business Manager (without the meta tag markup)
